scripts.manifest:emit: npm run build && node scripts/emit-manifest.mjs ../site-manifest.yaml generated-manifest
scripts.ui:emit: npm run build && node scripts/emit-ui.mjs ../site-manifest.yaml generated-ui ../.browserslistrc
scripts.orchestration:check: npm run build && node scripts/run-orchestration.mjs ../site-manifest.yaml generated-orchestration
scripts.framework:doctor: npm run build && node scripts/framework-cli.mjs doctor ../site-manifest.yaml fixtures/orchestration-fixture.mjs
scripts.framework:plan: npm run build && node scripts/framework-cli.mjs plan ../site-manifest.yaml fixtures/orchestration-fixture.mjs
scripts.framework:validate: npm run build && node scripts/framework-cli.mjs validate ../site-manifest.yaml fixtures/orchestration-fixture.mjs
scripts.framework:preview: npm run build && node scripts/framework-cli.mjs preview ../site-manifest.yaml fixtures/orchestration-fixture.mjs generated-framework-preview
scripts.ui:r3f:build: npm --prefix ui-r3f install --no-audit --no-fund && npm --prefix ui-r3f test
scripts.manifest:check: npm run test && npm run manifest:emit && npm run ui:emit && npm run orchestration:check && npm run framework:validate && npm run browser:check
